feed.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM EC-AXS-POD-B1.

entry.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware 2.55.1
entry.summary:
POD EC-AXS-POD-B1 — firmware 2.55.1

Part: EC AXS POD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
POD EC-AXS-POD-B1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: EC AXS POD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
POD EC-AXS-POD-B1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: EC AXS POD

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware 2.46.2
entry.summary:
POD EC-AXS-POD-B1 — firmware 2.46.2

Part: EC AXS POD

Platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements. Shifter AXS button indicates state of charge (SoC).

Released: 2023-08-24

entry.title: POD (EC-AXS-POD-B1) — firmware 2.37.1
entry.summary:
POD EC-AXS-POD-B1 — firmware 2.37.1

Part: EC AXS POD

General bug fixes and reliability improvements.

Released: 2022-02-25
